description:
Counter-Strike 2 companion that automates in-game tasks, such as accepting match, buying items and more.



Version 2.2.0 changelog
- Added Hebrew translation
- Added support for RTL languages
- Fixed notifications not being translated
- Little UI fix ups
- Fix with crash reports
Full Changelog: 2.1.10...2.2.0
🛡 VirusTotal GitHub Action analysis:
- CSAuto_Android.apk
- CSAuto_Installer.exe
- CSAuto_Portable.zip
